summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LLM Council LM Studio configuration refactoring. All major features working correctly including removed LM Studio tab, new Advanced Panel with per-model configuration, and backend API persistence.
passed_tests: LM Studio connection test API returns proper error for unreachable server
Settings page loads correctly with only required tabs (API Settings, Council Models, Chairman, Advanced)
LM Studio tab successfully removed from Settings
Advanced Panel opens from mode badge in header
Mode selection works (OpenRouter, LM Studio, Hybrid)
LM Studio mode shows per-model URL and Model Name fields for all council models
Hybrid mode shows source toggle per model with URL/Model Name when LM Studio selected
Chairman has separate config in both LM Studio and Hybrid modes
Each model has independent Test button for its URL
Test buttons work and show proper error messages for unreachable servers
Badge in header updates when mode changes (shows current mode: OpenRouter/LM Studio/Hybrid)
